title: Awareness As Unity
definition: The realization that one's true nature is an expression of the cosmos, beyond the illusion of a separate self.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Realizing that you are not just your thoughts and feelings but part of a larger universe.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Understanding that consciousness is not confined to the individual ego, but extends beyond it as a universal process.
difficulty_levels.expert: Developing a profound awareness of the interconnectedness between self and cosmos, transcending dualistic thinking and revealing an eternal, playful unity.

extra_fields.insight: The insight that one's true nature is not separate from the universe but an expression of it.
